link.title: Schedule a Test Drive | Lutz Auto Sales | Lutz FL

meta.name: description
meta.content: Schedule a free test drive at Lutz Auto Sales in Lutz, FL. No pressure. We will have your vehicle ready. Call (813) 727-6111 or book online today.

meta.name: twitter:site
meta.script: { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "AutoDealer", "@id": "https://www.lutzcars.com/#dealer", "name": "Lutz Auto Sales", "alternateName": "Lutz Cars", "url": "https://www.lutzcars.com", "logo": "https://cdn.powersports.com/cdn-cgi/image/h=540,w=720/A7F889EDA6964462608D85D22B4E9021.png", "image": "https://cdn.powersports.com/cdn-cgi/image/h=540,w=720/A7F889EDA6964462608D85D22B4E9021.png", "description": "Lutz Auto Sales is a trusted used car dealership in Lutz, FL specializing in quality pre-owned vehicles, Toyota Prius, and hybrid cars. All credit welcome. Carfax on every vehicle.", "telephone": "+18137276111", "email": "sales@lutzcars.com", "address": { "@type": "PostalAddress", "streetAddress": "17604 N US Highway 41, Unit 1", "addressLocality": "Lutz", "addressRegion": "FL", "postalCode": "33549", "addressCountry": "US" }, "geo": { "@type": "GeoCoordinates", "latitude": 28.1394, "longitude": -82.4593 }, "openingHoursSpecification": [ {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Monday","opens":"10:00","closes":"17:30"}, {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Tuesday","opens":"10:00","closes":"17:30"}, {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Wednesday","opens":"12:00","closes":"17:30"}, {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Thursday","opens":"12:00","closes":"17:30"}, {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Friday","opens":"10:00","closes":"17:30"}, {"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":"Saturday","opens":"09:00","closes":"12:00"} ], "priceRange": "$4,990 - $19,990", "paymentAccepted": "Cash, Check, Financing", "currenciesAccepted": "USD", "areaServed": [ {"@type":"City","name":"Lutz","sameAs":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lutz,_Florida"}, {"@type":"City","name":"Tampa","sameAs":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tampa,_Florida"}, {"@type":"City","name":"Wesley Chapel"}, {"@type":"City","name":"Land O Lakes"}, {"@type":"City","name":"New Tampa"}, {"@type":"City","name":"Carrollwood"}, {"@type":"City","name":"Odessa"} ], "hasMap": "https://maps.google.com/?q=17604+N+US+Hwy+41+Lutz+FL+33549", "sameAs": [ "https://www.lutzcars.com", "https://www.facebook.com/lutzcars", "https://www.google.com/maps/place/Lutz+Auto+Sales" ] }

meta.content: Schedule a Test Drive | Lutz Auto Sales | Lutz FL
Schedule a free test drive at Lutz Auto Sales in Lutz, FL. No pressure. We will have your vehicle ready. Call (813) 727-6111 or book online today.

div.span: 📍 17604 N US Hwy 41 Unit 1, Lutz FL 33549

div.p: Pick your car — we'll have it ready for you

div.div: ✅ Scheduled! We'll confirm your appointment by phone or email.

div.p: Your chosen vehicle will be cleaned and waiting for your arrival.
We'll walk you through the vehicle's full Carfax report before you drive.
Take your time — we want you to feel 100% confident in your decision.
If you love it, our finance team can get you approved the same day.

17604 N US Highway 41, Unit 1
Lutz, FL 33549
📞 (813) 727-6111

img.p: Your trusted used car dealership in Lutz, FL. Quality vehicles, transparent pricing, all credit welcome.

div.p: © 2026 Lutz Auto Sales · 17604 N US Hwy 41 Unit 1, Lutz FL 33549 · (813) 727-6111
